[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: groups. And we went for hikes in the mountains. And I was supposed to be one of the leaders of the groups. But I told them, listen, I cannot go. I have to go back to work. My vacation is through. And I have to be back. And I went back. And somebody else took over. And when I returned home, in the morning, I got up in order to go to the pharmacy. I turned on the radio when I heard a terrible accident in the mountains. They ran
